title: crotalaria exilipes
intro: Crotalaria exilipes is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea family, native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria exilipes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, and its leaves and roots are often used to make medicinal teas and poultices.
